# CWE-611: Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-611-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/xml"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: parses untrusted XML with Strict disabled, allowing external entity expansion.
func ImportCatalog(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	dec := xml.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(body))
	dec.Strict = false
	var catalog struct {
		XMLName xml.Name `xml:"catalog"`
		Item    string   `xml:"item"`
	}
	if err := dec.Decode(&catalog); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(catalog.Item))
}
